# PERF-191 positive: []*SmallStruct with a small struct
lang: go
file: PERF-191-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

type Point struct {
	X int
	Y int
}

func makePoints(n int) []*Point {
	out := make([]*Point, n)
	for i := 0; i < n; i++ {
		out[i] = &Point{X: i, Y: i}
	}
	return out
}
